chapter_title: 女教师 SDXL 参考图测试

scene_anchors.office_study: bright office study environment, grey parquet patterned tiled floor, large stack of books and notebooks on the desk to the left, dark office cabinet with binders behind, strong sunlight from the right

render_profile.notes: SDXL office test using cleaned square subject and scene references through IP-Adapter Style + Composition, without the SD1.5 VAE chain.

panels.scene_description: full-body shot of a female teacher standing in an office study and looking slightly down at a white smartphone in her left hand

prompt_build.local_positive: full-body shot of a female teacher, center framing, looking down slightly at a white smartphone in her left hand, matching the cleaned subject and scene references, wearing a short white lace bolero blazer jacket with intricate floral pattern, wearing a fitted white jacquard mini dress with subtle floral woven pattern, wearing semi-sheer gray tights with a repeatable small diagonal logo-like monogram pattern across both legs, wearing gray and white pointed high heels, clear lace edges, visible tights pattern, realistic textile thickness, realistic cloth shading, premium 3d comic realism, clear material separation between skin, tights, jacket, dress and heels

narration: 她更像一张被参考图牢牢牵住的 SDXL 结果。
